titleStmt.title: SII 26.363: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 363. (A.R. No. 342 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Bukkarāya, son of Harihararāya II Kali 4488 [Prab]hava Aṟpaśi 25, (Thursday) = 1387 A.D. October 24.

summary.p: It records a grant of 500 kuḻi of land in Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr and Tribuvaṉamādēviviḷāgam, both situated in the Kāñchīpuramārāchchiyār (Kāñchīpura-mahārājyam) by Ōbaḷadēvamāhārāśaṉ described as Piḷḷaiyār. The 500 kuḻi comprised of lands given away by ten different persons at the rate of 50 kuḻi each.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī harihararāyaṉ kumāraṉ
pokkarāyaṉūkkuc cellā niṉṟa kali
yuka varṣam nālāyirattu nāṉū
ṟṟu Eṉpatteṭṭiṉ meṟ cellā niṉ
ṟa pavavaruṣam Aṟpaci mātam 2 10 5 tiyati piḷḷaiyār
Opaḷatevamakarācaṉ kāñcipuramārācciyār ko
k kūvam Āṉa tiyākacamuttirana
llūrilum tirupuvaṉamātevi viḷākattilum caṟuvamāṉiya Iṟaiili
Āka naṭakkumpaṭikku viṭṭa kuṟumuṭi tarātitta
ku 5 10m kuṟumuṭi tiruveṅkaṭanātaṉ ku 5 10m ttevaṉ matu
[rān=taka] pallavarayaṉ ku 5 10m kuṟumuṭi tiruveṅkaṭa kuṟumuṭi
pallavarayaṉ ku 5 10 kuṟumuṭi toṇṭaimāṉ kavar ku
ṟum cantiṟātittavaraiyil kāṇi Āṭci Ākakkaikkoṇṭu
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruveṅkaṭanātaṉ Eḻuttu
vāṉaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cempiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai

cuntaraṉ kaḷappāḷaṉ ku 5 10m Iruṅkaṇūr kiḻavaṉ
cempiyataraiyaṉ ku 5 10m kumārāttaṉ kiṉiyā niṉṟa
ku 5 10m kumārāttaṉ kūttāṇṭai ku 5 10m Āka ku 5 100ikku
Āka naṭattikkoḷḷavum Ivai maturāntaka viḻuppa
Irācanārāyaṇap pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai toṇṭai
Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Aruḷāḷap perumāṉ Eḻuttu § I
Ivai kūttāṇṭai Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
